note: RESERVED slot. A physically-measured meter reading is a THIRD attestor's separate signed claim over the SAME subject_digest (8cf0c36ee36a7b98f2ea7c39251ec4faa337393a8c2e14443c12783e3f51623d), joined at composition level — NOT a role added to the WHAT capsule or the bilateral spec. Fill when a third-attestor sample is supplied.

template._description: TEMPLATE — skeleton for a third-attestor claim. A third-attestor is a party independent of both the capsule producer (WHAT) and the receipt producer (WHO). It files its own signed claim over subject_digest, joined at composition level only — no embedding into either record.

action_reference._note: The third-attestor anchors its claim to the same action — identified only by subject_digest = SHA-256(JCS(action)). It does not need a copy of the full action.

third_attestor_claim._role_note: Role is declarative — the composition model supports any independent-observer role (metering, auditing, inspection, etc.).
third_attestor_claim._claim_note: SYNTHETIC — this metering observation is fabricated for template purposes only. The observed_delta_kw (11.8 kW) is plausible given the action's target_delta_kw (12.0 kW). A real third attestor would independently observe and sign this claim.
third_attestor_claim._signature_note: A real third-attestor claim carries a cryptographic signature over the claim content from the observer's key. Replace this placeholder with an actual signature.

template.freeze_rule: This slot is filled when two independent implementations produce the same subject_digest AND a genuine third-attestor signs their claim over it. File as a PR to the agent-accountability org with your run output and the signed claim.
